title: 1. Extraordinary connections of lung and urinary bladder: LU5 on the lung channe
text:
bladder channel compose the “four flex pair 四彎配”, which is the most important point combination for
blood-letting.  It will treat many miscellaneous and difficult and complex diseases.  Lung channel is good
at treating skin disorders while BL40 on the bladder channel is good at treating boil and carbuncles.
Blood-letting on BL40 and Zhiwu (11.26) point (on the lung channel) forms a great combination for
various skin diseases.  Those are the effective combination examples of the extraordinary connections of
the lung and bladder.
